update jsh_freight_head
bill_no = #{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bill_time = #{billTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
car_no = #{carNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
carrier_id = #{carrierId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
unit_price = #{unitPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_weight = #{totalWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_freight = #{totalFreight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paid_amount = #{paidAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_operator = #{paymentOperator,jdbcType=BIGINT},
file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_freight_head set bill_no = #{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bill_time = #{billTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, car_no = #{carNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, carrier_id = #{carrierId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, unit_price = #{unitPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_weight = #{totalWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_freight = #{totalFreight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
